basic_details.job_title: SASTRA Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: SASTRA Deemed University is recruiting 1 Project Assistant post with Master’s degree qualification, last date 31 July 2026.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | desirable skills: Prototyping Embedded Systems and Medical Signal Processing | age limit (maximum): 35 Years
qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Electronics/ Communication Systems/Computer Science/VLSI/Embedded Systems or any other degree relevant to the project with 55% Marks

vacancy_details.details: Total Posts: 1 Project Title: Development of Smart Assistive Wearable for Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Selection will be based on qualifications
and performance in the interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The selected candidate will have the opportunity to register for a Ph.D. degree at SASTRA Deemed University.
how_to_apply: Interested candidates are requested to send their resume to the Principal Investigator via email at [email protected] on or before 31-07-2026. The interview date will be intimated via email or phone.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary for the project duration. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Opportunity to register for Ph.D. at SASTRA Deemed University.

content_sections.heading: SASTRA Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: SASTRA Deemed University has invited applications for the position of Project Assistant in the AICTE-RPS funded research project. The notification includes complete details on the project title, essential qualifications, salary, age limit, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full details before applying. Download SASTRA Deemed University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

SASTRA Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Selection will be based on qualifications, experience, and performance in the interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The selected candidate will have the opportunity to register for a Ph.D. degree at SASTRA Deemed University.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for SASTRA Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates are requested to send their resume to the Principal Investigator via email at [email protected] on or before 31-07-2026. The interview date will be intimated via email or phone.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for SASTRA Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary for the project duration. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Opportunity to register for Ph.D. at SASTRA Deemed University.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SASTRA University Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the resume is 31 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Assistant at SASTRA Deemed University?
faq.answer: The monthly salary is Rs. 31,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for SASTRA Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Master’s degree in Electronics, Communication Systems, Computer Science, VLSI, Embedded Systems, or any relevant degree with minimum 55% marks.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are there in SASTRA University Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: There is 01 (One) vacancy for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for SASTRA AICTE RPS Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Send your resume via email to [email protected] on or before 31 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the project duration for SASTRA University Project Assistant?
faq.answer: The project duration is 36 Months.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SASTRA Project Assistant Recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is required.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for SASTRA Deemed University Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 Years.

faq.question: Q9. Will selected candidates get PhD opportunity at SASTRA University?
faq.answer: Yes, the selected candidate will have the opportunity to register for a Ph.D. degree at SASTRA Deemed University.

faq.answer: Prototyping Embedded Systems and Medical Signal Processing.
